title: Iranians Sink Into Despair Facing War Deaths and Skyrocketing Inflation
summary_full: An imploding economy is causing hopelessness among both pro- and anti-government Iranians. And for those who wished for regime change, the letdown is palpable.
summary_public: An imploding economy is causing hopelessness among both pro- and anti-government Iranians. And for those who wished for regime change, the letdown is palpable.
